entry.name: MAV_MISSION_TYPE_MISSION_LAUNCH
entry.description: Items are mission commands for launch mission.

entry.name: MAV_MISSION_TYPE_MISSION_ENROUTE
entry.description: Items are mission commands for enroute segment of mission.

entry.name: MAV_MISSION_TYPE_MISSION_RECOVERY
entry.description: Items are mission commands for recover segment of mission.

entry.name: MAV_MISSION_TYPE_MISSION_TAXI
entry.description: Items are mission commands for taxi segment of mission.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_MISSION_START
entry.description: Defines mission start and contingency waypoint.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_VTOL_TAKEOFF
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_SET_SPEED
entry.description: Sets the hold time for the next waypoint.
entry.param: Ground speed setting. Holds until another MAV_CMD_AIFCS_SET_SPEED is sequenced.
Speed type setting. Holds until another MAV_CMD_AIFCS_SET_SPEED is sequenced.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_CUT
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_THROUGH
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_FW_LAND
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_HOVER
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ARC
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_TIME_LOITER
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_LAP_LOITER
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_RW2FW_TRANSITION
entry.description: AIFCS rotary-wing to fixed-wing transition waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_FW2RW_TRANSITION
entry.description: AIFCS fixed-wing to rotarywing transition waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_ROLL_SYSID
entry.description: AIFCS roll axis system identification waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_PITCH_SYSID
entry.description: AIFCS pitch axis system identification waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_YAW_SYSID
entry.description: AIFCS yaw axis system identification waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_THRUST_SYSID
entry.description: AIFCS thrust axis system identification waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_HOLD_LEVEL
entry.description: AIFCS hold level at current flight condition waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_STOP_HOLD_HDG
entry.description: AIFCS come to a stop and hold current heading waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_STOP_SET_HDG
entry.description: AIFCS come to a stop and specify heading waypoint
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_SET_ROUTE_COMPLETE
entry.description: AIFCS set flag indicating route completed.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_CLEAR_ROUTE_COMPLETE
entry.description: AIFCS clear flag indicating route completed.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_SET_SELECTED_PROFILE
entry.description: Sets the profile id for the next waypoint.
entry.param: Profile id setting. Holds until another MAV_CMD_AIFCS_SET_SELECTED_PROFILE is sequenced.

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_ACTION_EXECUTE_SELECTED_PROFILE
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_THROUGH_SEGMENT_TOA
entry.description: AIFCS through waypoint with segment time-of-arrival
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_AIR_THROUGH_GLOBAL_TOA
entry.description: AIFCS through waypoint with global time-of-arrival
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_VTOL_LAND
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_GROUND_PRECISION
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

entry.name: MAV_CMD_AIFCS_GROUND
entry.param: Next waypoint in mission (0 for automatic)

enum.name: PANDION_MONARCH_USE_MODE
enum.description: Bitmask to convert the MNRCH_USE_MODE param to a set of sensors that a monarch instance should ingest. IMU accelerometer data will always be ingested.

message.name: PANDION_PARAM_VALUE
message.description: Emit the value of a onboard parameter. The inclusion of param_count and param_index in the message allows the recipient to keep track of received parameters and allows him to re-request missing parameters after a loss or timeout. The parameter microservice is documented at https://mavlink.io/en/services/parameter.html. Mirrors PARAM_VALUE, but for a 64-bit value.
message.field: Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL if the length is less than 16 human-readable chars and WITHOUT null termination (NULL) byte if the length is exactly 16 chars - applications have to provide 16+1 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string

message.name: PANDION_PARAM_SET
message.description: Set a parameter value (write new value to permanent storage). The receiving component should acknowledge the new parameter value by broadcasting a PARAM_VALUE message (broadcasting ensures that multiple GCS all have an up-to-date list of all parameters). If the sending GCS did not receive a PANDION_PARAM_VALUE within its timeout time, it should re-send the PANDION_PARAM_SET message. The parameter microservice is documented at https://mavlink.io/en/services/parameter.html. PANDION_PARAM_SET may also be called within the context of a transaction (started with MAV_CMD_PARAM_TRANSACTION). Within a transaction the receiving component should respond with PARAM_ACK_TRANSACTION to the setter component (instead of broadcasting PANDION_PARAM_VALUE), and PANDION_PARAM_SET should be re-sent if this is ACK not received. Mirrors PARAM_SET, but for 64-bit value
message.field: Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL if the length is less than 16 human-readable chars and WITHOUT null termination (NULL) byte if the length is exactly 16 chars - applications have to provide 16+1 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string

message.name: PANDION_WCA_MONITOR_STATUS
message.description: Contains status relating to Warnings, Cautions, Advisories (WCAs) and monitors.
message.field: WCA set or cleared by this event
Monitor set or cleared by this event

message.name: PANDION_MONITOR_OVERRIDE_CMD
message.description: Sent to control monitor override.

message.name: PANDION_MONITOR_CURRENT_STATUS
message.description: Contains the current status of all monitors.

message.name: PANDION_STATUS
message.description: Pandion system status.
message.field: GCS asset ID for this vehicle

message.name: PANDION_VERSION_INFO
message.description: Pandion version information.
message.field: Contingency Management XML version SHA1 hash
Pandion software version number as a string
Pandion is a debug build flag

message.name: PANDION_ACTUATION_SYS_STATUS
message.description: Pandion actuation system status.

message.name: PANDION_AUX_INS_GPS
message.description: Pandion Auxiliary INS GPS information.
message.field: Position difference between INS output and raw GPS position
Velocity difference between INS output and raw GPS position

message.name: PANDION_GEODETIC_POS_COV_MATRIX
message.description: Global Position Covariance Matrix (lat, long, alt, Vn, Ve, Vd).
message.field: Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot) by checking for the magnitude of the number.
Diagonal of the 6x6 cross-covariance matrix - states: lat (deg2), lon (deg2), alt (m2), Vn (m2/s2), Ve (m2/s2), Vd (m2/s2).

message.name: PANDION_SEEKER_DATA
message.description: Summarized seeker data.
message.field: Body frame azimuth angle (about the z-axis in degrees) to the parameterized target location
Body frame elevation angle (about the y-axis in degrees) to the parameterized target location
Body frame azimuth angle (about the z-axis in degrees) to the centroid of the bounding box as reported by the seeker
Body frame elevation angle (about the y-axis in degrees) to the centroid of the track bounding box as reported by the seeker
Seeker measured azimuth angle of target relative to ownship in the body frame
Seeker measured elevation angle of target relative to ownship in the body frame
Line-of-sight angle noise covariance array element 0 from seeker
Line-of-sight angle noise covariance array element 3 from seeker
Estimated azimuth angle of target relative to ownship in Tracker frame
Estimated elevation angle of target relative to ownship in Tracker frame
Internal initialization counter for number of seeker measurements
Internal timestamp of last ownship information
Internal timestamp of last seeker information
Internal flag for indicating whether filter has been initialized

message.name: PANDION_ASSET_POSE
message.description: Vehicle asset pose message.
message.field: Flag indicating whether the data in this message is valid.
Diagonal of the 6x6 cross-covariance matrix - states: lat (deg2), lon (deg2), alt (m2), Vn (m2/s2), Ve (m2/s2), Vd (m2/s2).
The upper triangle including the diagonal of the orientation covariance matrix rad2 in row-major order. Index notation: a11 a12 a13 a22 a23 a33

message.name: PANDION_RECOVERY_ROUTE_CMD
message.description: Update the active mission to the recovery route
message.field: Reserved (MAVLink requires at least one field in message)

message.name: PANDION_RECOVERY_ROUTE_CMD_ACK
message.description: PANDION_RECOVERY_ROUTE_CMD ack

message.name: PANDION_ABORT_LAUNCH_CMD
message.description: Command the vehicle to abort launch (only valid during AUTO_TAKEOFF flight regime)
message.field: Reserved (MAVLink requires at least one field in message)

message.name: PANDION_ABORT_LAUNCH_CMD_ACK
message.description: PANDION_ABORT_LAUNCH_CMD ack

message.name: PANDION_POWER_OFF_CMD
message.description: Command the vehicle to power off (only valid during GROUND_DISARMED flight regime)
message.field: Reserved (MAVLink requires at least one field in message)

message.name: PANDION_POWER_OFF_CMD_ACK
message.description: PANDION_POWER_OFF_CMD ack

message.name: PANDION_SCUTTLE_CMD
message.description: Command the vehicle to scuttle
message.field: Reserved (MAVLink requires at least one field in message)

message.name: PANDION_SCUTTLE_CMD_ACK
message.description: PANDION_SCUTTLE_CMD ack

message.name: PANDION_FTS_STATUS
message.description: Pandion FTS status.

message.name: PANDION_VMS_INFO
message.description: Pandion VMS information.

message.name: VMS_CONFIG_CRC_DATA
message.description: CRC for stable and unstable parameter sets

message.name: PANDION_LOG_STATUS
message.description: Pandion Log status
message.field: Max size of log file in bytes
High watermark for log FIFO in kilobytes
Number of bytes currently in use on the stroage device

message.name: PANDION_MA_STATUS
message.description: (Rate: 5Hz) The following message is used to describe vehicle information relavent to mission autonomy.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
If TRUE, then VMS is ready to be commanded into MA control modes

message.name: MA_PANDION_CONTROL_MODE_REQUEST
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle enter a particular control mode.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_CONTROL_MODE_REQUEST_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_CONTROL_MODE_REQUEST to reflect whether than request was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_CONTROL_MODE_REQUEST to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_HSA_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: 1Hz when in HSA control mode) The following message is sent to request the vehicle achieve a certain heading, speed, and altitude.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
(CURRENTLY ONLY COURSE SUPPORTED) See PANDION_MA_HEADING_TYPE, describes whether heading fields are course or heading
(CURRENTLY UNUSED) greater than or equal to 0, 0 = max rate of change
(CURRENTLY ONLY GROUNDSPEED SUPPORTED) See PANDION_MA_SPEED_TYPE, describes whether speed fields are groundspeed or airspeed
(CURRENTLY UNUSED) greater than or equal to 0, 0 = max rate of change
(CURRENTLY UNUSED) greater than or equal to 0, where 0 = max rate of change
Indicates whether the HSA feature is enabled or disabled through the QGC (QGroundControl) widget enabled ( 1 )

message.name: PANDION_MA_HSA_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_HSA_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_HSA_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: PANDION_MA_INERTIAL_STATE
message.description: (Rate: 10Hz) The following message is used to describe the current inertial state of the vehicle. The position is in GPS-frame (right-handed, Z-up).
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
If TRUE, then heading_deg is valid
Heading (Yaw), [0, 360 (not inclusive)] [Check heading_valid before using, UINT16_MAX when invalid]

message.name: MA_PANDION_RUNWAY_COUNT_REQUEST
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is used to request the number of currently loaded/enabled runways.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_RUNWAY_COUNT_REQUEST_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_RUNWAY_COUNT_REQUEST.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_RUNWAY_COUNT_REQUEST to which his ack corresponds to
The number of runways currently loaded/enabled

message.name: MA_PANDION_RUNWAY_INFO_REQUEST
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is used to request the runway information for the runway at the index specified by runway_index.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
The index of the runway whose information is being requested (note: 0-indexed)

message.name: PANDION_MA_RUNWAY_INFO_REQUEST_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_RUNWAY_INFO_REQUEST.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_RUNWAY_INFO_REQUEST to which this ack corresponds to
If TRUE, then runway is enabled and considered valid

message.name: MA_PANDION_TAXI_RUNWAY_LOAD
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to set the runway for taxiing to the runway defined by runway_id.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_TAXI_RUNWAY_LOAD_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_TAXI_RUNWAY_LOAD to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_TAXI_RUNWAY_LOAD to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_TAXI_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle begin taxiing.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_TAXI_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_TAXI_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_TAXI_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_TAXI_ABORT
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to abort taxi.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_TAXI_ABORT_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_TAXI_ABORT to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_TAXI_ABORT to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_RUNWAY_LOAD
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle generate a launch route relative to the runway defined by runway_id.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
The requested runway to generate launch route relative to

message.name: PANDION_MA_LAUNCH_RUNWAY_LOAD_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_RUNWAY_LOAD to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_RUNWAY_LOAD to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to launch vehicle.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_LAUNCH_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_SEEKER_SYSID_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to seeker sys id vehicle.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_SEEKER_SYSID_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_SEEKER_SYSIS_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_SEEKER_SYSID_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_SEEKER_SYSID_ABORT_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to abort seeker sys id vehicle.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_SEEKER_SYSID_ABORT_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_SEEKER_SYSIS_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_SEEKER_SYSID_ABORT_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_ABORT
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to abort launch using generated launch route.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_LAUNCH_ABORT_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_ABORT to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_LAUNCH_ABORT to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_RUNWAY_LOAD
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle generate a recovery route relative to the runway defined by runway_id.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
The requested runway to generate recovery route relative to

message.name: PANDION_MA_RECOVERY_RUNWAY_LOAD_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_RUNWAY_LOAD to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_RUNWAY_LOAD to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to begin flying generated recovery route.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_RECOVERY_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_ABORT
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to abort recovery.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_RECOVERY_ABORT_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_ABORT to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_RECOVERY_ABORT to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_LOFT_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to command a loft manuever
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
Desired pitch to obtain during the loft manuever

message.name: PANDION_MA_LOFT_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_LOFT_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from PANDION_MA_LOFT_COMMAND_ACK to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_SLICE_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to command a slice manuever
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)
Desired heading change for the slice manuever in degrees
Window which indicates that we have captured the desired heading, indicated delta value in the positive and negative direction
Desired Angle of bank to initiate maneuver
Maximum permissible altitude loss in meters before the aircraft will reduce bank

message.name: PANDION_MA_SLICE_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_SLICE_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_SLICE_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: PANDION_LOG_CONTROL_CMD
message.description: Pandion Log Control Command

message.name: INNER_GEOFENCE_DATA
message.description: Inner geofence unstable parameter data

message.name: OUTER_GEOFENCE_DATA
message.description: Outer geofence unstable parameter data

message.name: PANDION_TEXENSE_ADS_DATA
message.description: Pandion Texense Air Data System Data.

message.name: PANDION_SBF_CN0
message.description: SBF CN0 data.

message.name: PANDION_WHEEL_SENSE_DATA
message.description: Wheel Sense Data.

message.name: PANDION_FUEL_FLOW_SENSORS_DATA
message.description: Fuel Flow Sensors Data.
message.field: Total pulse counts from fuel flow sensors
Total flow gallons from fuel flow sensors

message.name: PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUIDANCE_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUIDANCE_REQUEST to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.

message.name: PANDION_RADAR_ALT_DATA
message.description: Radar altimeter data.
message.field: Min Altitude set for Rad Alt
Max Altitude set for Rad Altt

message.name: PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUIDANCE_LLA_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to update the location of the external guidance command

message.name: PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUDIANCE_LLA_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUIDANCE_LLA_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUIDANCE_LLA_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: PANDION_ANALOG_DATA
message.description: Analog data.

message.name: PANDION_STANAG_ROUTE_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a PANDION_STANAG_ROUTE_REQUEST to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.

message.name: MA_PANDION_GROUND_ARMED_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle to enter ground armed.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_GROUND_ARMED_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_GROUND_ARMED_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_GROUND_ARMED_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_TAXI_STOP_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle begin taxiing.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_TAXI_STOP_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_TAXI_STOP_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_TAXI_STOP_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_TAXI_START_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to request the vehicle begin taxiing.
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_TAXI_START_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_TAXI_STOP_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_TAXI_STOP_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_POPU_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to command a popu manuever
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_POPU_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_POPU_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from PANDION_MA_POPU_COMMAND_ACK to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: MA_PANDION_WIND_UP_TURN_COMMAND
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent to command a wind up turn manuever
message.field: Counter that increments from 0 to 255 (value wrapping back to 0)

message.name: PANDION_MA_WIND_UP_TURN_COMMAND_ACK
message.description: (Rate: Aperiodic) The following message is sent in response to a MA_PANDION_WIND_UP_TURN_COMMAND to reflect whether that command was accepted or rejected.
message.field: Wrap of 'counter' from MA_PANDION_WIND_UP_TURN_COMMAND to which this ack corresponds to

message.name: PANDION_WCET_STATS
message.description: Pandion WCET Stats

message.name: PANDION_MONARCH_STATUS
message.description: Pandion Monarch status.
message.field: Monarch aiding configuration, specific to vehicle application
GNSS-Denied configuration, specific to vehicle application - 0 for GNSS-Aided, 1 for GNSS-Denied
Time since last Silvus ranging update
North wind speed estimate standard deviation

message.name: PANDION_GENERIC_STATUS_UPDATE
message.description: Give generic status updates for long running processes. For example, purging the SD Card. ids 0-0xFFFF are reserved for common. Rest can be used by the vehicle
message.field: Which item this status message is for
Text update for the GCS to print

message.name: PANDION_EXTERNAL_GUIDANCE_REQUEST
message.description: Issues an external guidance request to pandion.
message.field: External guidance request command (0 for disable, 1 for enable)

message.name: PANDION_AEROPROBE_DEFIANT_AIR_DATA
message.description: Aeroprobe Defiant Micro Air Data System Air Data.

message.name: PANDION_STANAG_ROUTE_REQUEST
message.description: Issues a stanag route request to pandion.
message.field: end a STANAG route (0 for accepted, 1 for denied)

message.name: PANDION_MONARCH_NAV_OUT
message.description: Pandion Monarch Nav Out Telemetry
message.field: Altitude above WGS84 ellipsoid in m
Velocity in local NED frame in mps
Bitmask for whether IMU bias estimates are set

message.name: PANDION_MONARCH_EKF_OUT
message.description: Pandion Monarch EKF Out Telemetry

message.name: PANDION_MONARCH_GNSS_OUT
message.description: Pandion Monarch GNSS Out Telemetry
message.field: Bit field indicating the validity of the fields ihis message defined as an enum
NED Velocity measurement variance in m2/s2
Indication of monitor being set for GNSS measurements

message.name: PANDION_MONARCH_HEADING_OUT
message.description: Pandion Monarch Heading Out Telemetry
message.field: Bit field indicating the validity of the fields ihis message defined as an enum
Indication of monitor being set for Heading measurements

message.name: PANDION_MONARCH_CONTROL_STATUS
message.description: Pandion Monarch Control Status - Reports current USE_OUT and USE_MODE values
message.field: Current Monarch sensor usage mode bitmask

message.name: PANDION_OMEN_ENGINE_STATUS
message.description: Pandion omen engine status.

message.name: PANDION_OMEN_POWER_SYSTEM_DATA
message.description: Pandion Omen power system data.

message.name: PANDION_OMEN_ENGINE_CONTROL
message.description: Pandion omen engine control.

message.name: AIR_DATA_SENSOR_STATUS
message.description: Air Data Sensor Information.
message.field: Speed of vehicle relative to the air mass
True Air Speed (TAS) derived from Mach number
Barometric altitude based on static pressure
Pressure from differential sensor in PSI
Pressure from absolute sensor in PSI
Temperature from differential sensor in degC
Temperature from absolute sensor in degC

message.name: SW_UPLOAD_STATUS
message.description: Software Download Progress Information.
message.field: Current state of software upload state machine
Total units that need to be completed

message.name: PANDION_HSA_CONTROL
message.description: Pandion HSA control.

message.name: PANDION_WAYPOINT_OFFSET_CONTROL
message.description: Pandion Waypoint control.

message.name: PANDION_COMPANION_HEARTBEAT
message.description: Pandion heartbeat signal

message.name: PANDION_C2_HEARTBEAT
message.description: Pandion command and control signal

message.name: PANDION_SEEKER_REPORT_TRACK_OBSERVATION
message.description: Input to the Pandion-internal TSE from an external seeker
message.field: Body frame azimuth angle (about the z-axis in degrees) to the centroid of the bounding box
Body frame elevation angle (about the y-axis in degrees) to the centroid of the track bounding box
UUID associated with each track, sending a new trackId will reset the estimator
Line-of-sight angle noise covariance array elements from seeker
Range estimate in meters to the track
Variance of range estimate in meters2
Flag indicating whether the range data in this message is valid.

message.name: PANDION_TSE
message.description: Pandion Target State Estimate
message.field: Figure of merit for source 1, 0 if not valid
Figure of merit for source 2, 0 if not valid

message.name: PANDION_EXTGUID_STATUS
message.description: Control Status from Vehicle
message.field: Use Mission Autonomy provided target LLA
External guidance has been requested by C2
External guidance has been requested by mission autonomy
External guidance has been requested by waypoint criteria in mission
Flag indicating when automatic engagement by waypoint criteria is enabled

message.name: OUTER_GEOFENCE_DATA_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of DIVE_XL_APPEND_WAYPOINT message
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: PANDION_VBN_POSE_ESTIMATE
message.description: VBN (Visual-Based Navigation) camera pose estimate frame
message.field: Time of validity nanoseconds since GPS epoch
If multiple sensors are used, which is producing this measurement
Position covariance (upper triangle: xx, xy, xz, yy, yz, zz) in sensor FRD frame
w element: attitude quaternion of the sensor (local NED to sensor FRD)
x element: attitude quaternion of the sensor (local NED to sensor FRD)
y element: attitude quaternion of the sensor (local NED to sensor FRD)
z element: attitude quaternion of the sensor (local NED to sensor FRD)
estimate attitude covariance (upper triangle: xx, xy, xz, yy, yz, zz)
confidence score from VBN software bounded [0, 1]
x (forward) translation in meters of the nav point (imu) to sensor in FRD frame
y (right) translation in meters of the nav point (imu) to sensor in FRD frame
z (down) translation in meters of the nav point (imu) to sensor in FRD frame
Extrinsic translation covariance (upper triangle: xx, xy, xz, yy, yz, zz)
w element: rotation from the nav point (imu) FRD to sensor FRD
x element: rotation from the nav point (imu) FRD to sensor FRD
y element: rotation from the nav point (imu) FRD to sensor FRD
z element: rotation from the nav point (imu) FRD to sensor FRD
Extrinsic attitude covariance (upper triangle: xx, xy, xz, yy, yz, zz)

message.name: PANDION_VBN_BODY_POSE_ESTIMATE
message.description: VBN (Visual-Based Navigation) body pose estimate frame
message.field: Time of validity nanoseconds since GPS epoch
If multiple sensors are used, which is producing this measurement
Position covariance (upper triangle: xx, xy, xz, yy, yz, zz) in ECEF frame
w element: rotation from ECEF frame to body FRD frame, w
x element: rotation from ECEF frame to body FRD frame, x
y element: rotation from ECEF frame to body FRD frame, y
z element: rotation from ECEF frame to body FRD frame, z
estimate attitude covariance (upper triangle: xx, xy, xz, yy, yz, zz)
confidence score from VBN software bounded [0, 1]
